title: callista walkeria
intro: Callista walkeria, also known as the Asian butterfly orchid, is a type of orchid plant native to China and Southeast Asia. Its medicinal properties are primarily derived from its roots, which contain compounds that have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and improve overall well-being. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions and topical applications.
